basic_details.job_title: CSIR NEERI Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Environmental Engineering Research Center (CSIR NEERI)

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Chemistry/ Bio-Chemistry/ Environmental Science
qualification.details: Project Associate-I (2.1 PAT-I): M.Sc. in Chemistry/ Bio-Chemistry/ Environmental Science from a recognized University

salary_details.details: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA to Scholars who are selected through (a) National Eligibility Tests-CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) or GATE OR (b) A selection process through National level examinations conducted by Central Govt. Departments and their Agencies and Institutions. Rs. 25,000/- + HRA for others who do not fall under (i) above.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NEERI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Project Associate-I position at CSIR NEERI is 22nd June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Chemistry, Bio-Chemistry, or Environmental Science from a recognized University to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I post is 35 years as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 31,000/- + HRA for candidates selected through national eligibility tests or national level examinations, and Rs. 25,000/- + HRA for others.

faq.question: Q5. How will the candidates be selected for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an Online Interview conducted through platforms like MS Team or Skype.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Associate-I post at CSIR NEERI.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is project-based and is for engagement of R&D project staff on a purely temporary basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is CSIR NEERI located?
faq.answer: CSIR NEERI is located in Nagpur, Maharashtra, with the pincode 440020.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is RECRUIT_SD_4A_SHWMD_15062026.
